subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! To Thee be all praise, inasmuch as Thou hast manifested me in the days of the Dawning-Place of Thy signs and the Dayspring of Thy clear tokens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ع ل قل الهی الهی لک الحمد بما اظهرتنی فی ایام مشرق آیاتک و مطلع بیناتک و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for purity; chastity
